task_completion.description: Access the SuiteCRM application and navigate to the Cases module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SuiteCRM web interface with the Cases list view open.

task_completion.description: Classify cases affecting more than 500 users (Walmart and Cisco) as P1 (High) priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The priority for the Walmart and Cisco cases is shown as 'High' or 'P1' in the case list or individual case edit screens.

task_completion.description: Update the descriptions of the 3 stale P1 cases with an escalation note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Case descriptions for the stale P1 cases show newly added text starting exactly with '[ESCALATION REVIEW]' followed by the situation and recommended next steps.

task_completion.description: Change the status of P1 cases from 'Open_New' to 'Open_Assigned'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status field for P1 cases is visible as 'Open_Assigned' (or 'Assigned') in the CRM interface.

task_completion.description: Do not escalate or reclassify cases that do not meet the impact threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contamination case ('PDF export font rendering issue for 3 internal users') remains unchanged, with no '[ESCALATION REVIEW]' note and priority not set to P1/High.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SuiteCRM web interface to make updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the SuiteCRM web UI, using edit forms and save buttons, rather than executing backend database scripts or API curl commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent properly entered the escalation notes into the CRM.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text entry is visible within the SuiteCRM description text areas, not just typed into a separate text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the CRM UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL queries (e.g., UPDATE cases SET...) or direct database manipulation are used to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are exactly 2 underclassified cases (Walmart and Cisco) affecting >500 users that must be reclassified to P1 (High). There are exactly 3 stale P1 cases (aged 8, 10, and 14 days) that require the '[ESCALATION REVIEW]' note. The case 'PDF export font rendering issue for 3 internal users' is a contamination case and must NOT be escalated or reclassified.
